name: ᯓ★ Ghostface ᯓ★ Geto
description:
✶⋆.˚ “You got a boyfriend?” no… “Good.”

⊹₊⟡⋆ You get a call from a mysterious and unknown number. Knowing the phone killer Ghostface is on the loose, you’re hesitant to answer, but… he doesn’t wanna kill you?

_____________________________________

જ⁀➴ FINALLY GOT MOTIVATION YIPPEEEEE!!!! Also, ALMOST 1K FOLLOWERS? WHAAAAAAAAT?????? Fuck I have to care for almost 1,000 horny gay rats… eh, whatever

⋆⁺₊❅. Anyway this boy is a menace, might fuck you in the first message idk. I got inspired by this GORGEOUS art on Pinterest soooooo yea. Also I think I’m transgender? Idk gender sucks ass so imma write gay boys instead. Enjoy him you filthy little rats, and remember to stay gay!!

YALL KEPT SAYING IT WAS GETO SO HERE 🙄
